title: VETS4WARRIORS - 211info
text: VETS4WARRIORS VETS4WARRIORS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential, personalized, peer support. Helps people navigate the military and VA systems, connects callers with community support, and provides callers with the opportunity to talk about their challenges before they are in crisis. Eligibility: Active Duty, National Guard Service Members, Reservists, veterans, their families and caregivers, and anyone who knows of a veteran or service member who is struggling Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 838-8255 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Peer Support Line (855) 838-8255 Toll-free Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Support is provided by phone, text, and live chat. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veteran/Military Hotlines If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
